d,L=513909+-513908,r[823107-823106]while L do H[L],d=H[L]-(651742-651741),d+(514168+-514167)if H[L]==-835766+835766 then H[L],i[L]=nil,nil end L=r[d]end end,function(r,d)local k=M(d)local l=function(l,D)return L(r,{l,D},d,k)end return l end,function(r,d)local k=M(d)local l=function(...)return L(r,{...},d,k)end return l end,function(r,d)local k=M(d)local l=function(l,D,z,C,f,i,H)return L(r,{l,D;z;C;f,i;H},d,k)end return l end return(V(-927213+1271650,{}))(k(f))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[d(-885367-(-921703))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...
